name: Coconut Peanut Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 lb boned and skinned chicken breast halves, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine peanuts and coconut flakes in a medium-sized bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, place flour; in another bowl, lightly beat the eggs.
3. Dip each chicken piece into the flour, then the egg wash, and finally roll in the peanut mixture.
4. Place the coated chicken pieces on a baking sheet.
5. Heat enough vegetable oil in a skillet to reach a depth of 1/2 inch. When hot, add chicken using a slotted spoon, about 6 pieces at a time. Cook for 4-6 minutes until cooked through and lightly golden, turning once. Adjust heat as needed to prevent over-browning. Drain on paper towels.
6. To prepare the dipping sauce, combine all ingredients in a small bowl.
